reviews.comment:
Muy bueno y completo pero hace 2 dias tuve q hacer fila para el baño poque la mitad no estaba habilitado y ademas nos fuimos sin beber ni comer nada x la cantidad de gente que habia.

(Translated by Google)
Very good and complete, but two days ago I had to queue for the bathroom because half of it was not open, and we also left without eating or drinking anything because of the number of people there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZajhfcFF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buenos y limpios baños... La Proveduría bien completa. Parque amplio y bien cuidado.
El tema es: NO SE LE OCURRA IR A LA PARRILLA RESTAURANT DEL FONDO. Parece modesto  y cálido. Pero la realidad es que ES UN DESASTRE! T0iene todo marcado y recalentado. Los precioos son muy caros para la mala calidad de todo lo que ofrecen. Hay poca higiene. Lleno de moscas!!! No hay servicio..... y además la carne y achuras, duras e imposibles de digerir, todo lleno de grasa , comida, pisos, ventanas, y también , te la llevas puesta en toda la ropa!!. Y ADEMÁS CARO!! A SALIR CORRIENDO!!

(Translated by Google)
Good, clean restrooms... The general store is well-stocked. Spacious and well-maintained park.

The thing is: DO NOT GO TO THE GRILL RESTAURANT IN THE BACK. It looks modest and welcoming. But the reality is, IT'S A DISASTER! Everything is charred and reheated. The prices are very high for the poor quality of everything they offer. There's little hygiene. It's full of flies!!! There's no service... and on top of that, the meat and offal are tough and impossible to digest, everything is covered in grease, food scraps—floors, windows, and you'll even get it all over your clothes!! AND IT'S EXPENSIVE TOO!! RUN AWAY!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZazRuVDV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindo parador. Sucios los baños y sucia la gente.  Se podrían limpiar más seguidos y que la gente no sea sucia!

(Translated by Google)
Nice inn. The bathrooms are dirty, and so are the people. They could be cleaned more often, and people should be less dirty!
